div.p:
100 SURVIVORS · 4-PLAYER CO-OP ARENA
CONNECT UP TO 4 XBOX CONTROLLERS FOR AUTO-JOIN
STARTS WITH SHIELD & HEX SHOTS · COLLECT MORE
ORANGE CRYSTAL = 30 SEC SHIELD · PURPLE = ALLY HEX
KILL ALL ENEMIES TO ADVANCE
